CANT_DO_THAT: You cannot do that right now
NO_HACK_DEVICE_INV: You don't have a useable device for this
GROUP_NOT_BIG: Not in group or not enough players in group
NO_ROPE_TIED: There is no rope tied to this
ROPE_ALREADY_TIED: There is a rope already tied to this!
NEED_HOLD_ROPE: You need to be holding a rope for this
VEHICLE_TOO_FAR: You are too far from the vehicle
ATM_NOT_PULLED: This ATM seems to be secured!
SHOULD_UNTIE: You should untie this ATM first
NOT_ENOUGH_POLICE: The city is too quiet, try again later..
ATM_LOCKED: ATM detected suspicious activity and has been locked down.
ATM_FAIL_COUNT: Security system has detected suspicious activity, you have %s tries left!
ATM_CRACKED: ATM successfully cracked! Wait for it to unlock!
ATM_HACK_COOLDOWN: ATMs security system is higtened, wait %s seconds before trying again..
PLAYER_COOLDOWN: You should wait till things cool down before hitting another ATM..
AREA_TOO_HOT: The ATMs in this area are too hot, try again later..
STAND_BACK: Stand back this is going to take some time!
CANT_SEARCH_YET: Security system is locked for %s more seconds!
